Hong Kong Vehicle Registration Marks Search

This site publishes historical Hong Kong vehicle registration mark auction results (PVRM/TVRM) extracted from Transport Department PDF handouts.

Important:
- All data comes from Transport Department published PDFs. If any discrepancy is found, the official published results shall prevail.
- Spaces and 2-row layout in PVRM are meaningful and preserved as stated in source PDFs.

Datasets (static JSON API):
- API index: /api/v1/index.json
- PVRM: /api/v1/pvrm/issues.manifest.json and /api/v1/pvrm/issues/{YYYY-MM-DD}.json
- TVRM physical: /api/v1/tvrm_physical/issues.manifest.json
- TVRM e-auction: /api/v1/tvrm_eauction/issues.manifest.json

Audit report:
- /audit.html
- /data/audit.json

Agent-readable guidance:
- Agent overview: /agent.md
- Skill summary: /skill.md
- Agent Skills index: /.well-known/agent-skills/index.json
- API catalog: /.well-known/api-catalog

Optional server-side search API (faster, if deployed):
- Health check: /api/health
- Search: /api/search?dataset=pvrm&q=L1BERTY&sort=amount_desc&page=1&page_size=200
- Issues: /api/issues?dataset=pvrm
- Issue: /api/issue?dataset=pvrm&auction_date=2026-01-17
